evals.prompt: Preview what the studio would generate for a one-page investor FAQ document for Northgate Minerals — run it locally in this session with no Eve spend, using the sample envelope facts (kind: document).
evals.expected_output: A structure-first events.ndjson + a contract-valid document artifact with the envelope facts verbatim

evals.prompt: Can you generate a 5-slide investor overview deck for Northgate the way the studio would, locally in this session? I want to check the output quality before paying for a real Eve run.
evals.expected_output: A structure-first events.ndjson + a deckconv-valid lecturn.deck/1 artifact
